node.text: Evan offers to work on improving health together with Sam.

node.text: Evan made dietary changes like cutting down on sugary snacks and eating more veggies and fruit for his health.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "seek advice from a doctor") on Observation 3 (Score: 0.77)

node.text: Evan advises Sam to focus on healthy swaps and taking small steps towards progress.

node.text: Evan struggled with his health a few years ago, focusing on exercise, diet, and lifestyle changes, which made a positive impact.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "seek advice from a doctor") on Observation 2 (Score: 0.60)

node.text: Evan had a pee accident near some roses and felt embarrassed about it.
Evan had a bit too much to drink and had an embarrassing incident involving someone's roses.
Evan went through a phase two years ago where he changed his diet and started walking regularly.
Evan mentions that letting go of unrealistic expectations was liberating both physically and mentally.
Evan assured Sam of his support and being there for them.
Evan believes progress takes time and advises Sam to take things one step at a time.
